items.title: Up to 15,000 England fans head to Dallas for World Cup opener

items.title: Lack of World Cup segregation a risk - fans' chief
items.summary: The head of fan group Football Supporters Europe says a lack of fan segregation at the 2026 World Cup shows Fifa has "lost control of their ticketing".
